resources.string: Learn how to play the classic domino game. Place tiles to connect matching numbers and block your opponents!
Each tile has two numbers (0–6). Match a number on an open end of the board to place your tile.
Select a tile from your hand that matches either end of the board, then tap Place to play it.
If you cannot place any tile, tap Draw to take a tile from the boneyard. If the boneyard is empty, your turn passes.
Empty your hand first to win! If no one can move and the boneyard is empty, the lowest-score player wins.
